series_metadata.series_description: The Employee Payroll Records contain payroll information for BWC employees to be retained as part of their personnel records (i.e., retirement breakdowns, tax withholdings, payroll deductions, address changes, etc).

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Scan into UDS – personnel files under payroll forms – verify scanned image is readable, and ; Electronic: in UDS – personnel files under payroll forms employee’s date of separation from BWC, and
